case_title: BAY AREA PROPERTIES, LTD et al VS. JOSH SULLIVAN et al

docket_entries.description: RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT SULLIVAN, JOSH

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BAY AREA PROPERTIES, LTD 1163 ASSOCIATES, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED PARTNERSHIP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SULLIVAN, JOSH THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1167 BUSH STREET, #302, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94109, COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF BAY AREA PROPERTIES, LTD 1163 ASSOCIATES, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED PARTNERSHIP SERVED FEB-04-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SULLIVAN, JOSH
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT SULLIVAN, JOSH
